---
title: "Akpeiil Shaker"
links:
  - label: GV300 Showcase
    url: "gv300.html"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::jolla
---

I am a final year student at University of Essex studying Politics and Economics My academic interests include electoral behaviour, political participation, and the use of data analysis to understand political systems.

This website presents a showcase of my work from the GV300 course, where I analyse electoral participation in the United Kingdom using R and statistical visualisation.

You can view my project here:

[**GV300 Showcase**](gv300.html)
